reasoning: The National UFO Reporting Center (NUFORC) regularly receives hundreds of UFO sighting reports per month, peaking in the summer months such as June due to better weather and more people being outside. Following the widespread public attention to military UAP reports in recent years (specifically Ryan Graves' description of "dark cubes inside clear spheres"), "cube" has emerged as a distinct and increasingly reported shape in UFO lore. The question notes that in December 2024 alone there were six reports of cube-shaped UFOs. Given that December had multiple such reports, and June historically brings a significantly higher volume of overall UFO sightings than winter months, it is highly probable that at least one sighting reported for June 2025 will describe or be categorized as a cube shape. The resolution criteria allow for checks "on or after July 1, 2025," which protects against any typical reporting or upload delays on NUFORC's end. Factoring in occasional baseline lulls in UFO reporting or arbitrary variations in how shapes are categorized by users in a given month, a probability of ~82% appropriately balances the strong likelihood with the inherent unpredictability of crowdsourced anomaly reports in a single month.
